page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package uses Bayesian hidden Ising models to identify IP-enriched genomic regions from ChIP-seq data. It can be used to analyze ChIP-seq data with and without controls and replicates.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package uses Bayesian hidden Ising models to identify IP-enriched genomic regions from ChIP-seq data. It can be used to analyze ChIP-seq data with and without controls and replicates.
